mapper.sql: favorite_seq, user_seq, bid_no, bid_ord, announce_date, bid_name, industry, contract_method, opening_date, estimated_price, agency, detail_url, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM progist.bid_favorites WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO progist.bid_favorites ( user_seq, bid_no, bid_ord, announce_date, bid_name, industry, contract_method, opening_date, estimated_price, agency, detail_url ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{bidNo}, #{bidOrd}, #{announceDate}, #{bidName}, #{industry}, #{contractMethod}, #{openingDate}, #{estimatedPrice}, #{agency}, #{detailUrl} )
